On.Send: AnimBracketStart Unload IGNORE Unload Unload,End DontResetOnUnhide
AnimBracketStart Unload IGNORE Unload Unload,End DontResetOnUnhide

HostSiteOps.Ops: SOpForwardLaunchGuide SOp2DRotation SOp180 SOpRotVariancerUp35 SOpPointDown1ByDot25 SOpRotationRandomPitch30

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Visor Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
